name: Spam Veggie Pita Pockets
recipeIngredient: 1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cubed (7 oz)
recipeInstructions: In a bowl, combine the SPAM, broccoli, cauliflower, tomato, carrot, cucumber, and onion. Toss with the dressing. Cover and chill in the refrigerator for several hours. Spoon the salad mixture into the pita pockets.
